proposal.title: Topics for next learning path
proposal.description: Which topics should be included in the next community learning path? Approve all topics you think are valuable.

options.label: Distributed systems
options.description: Consensus algorithms, partition tolerance, eventual consistency

options.label: Cooperative economics
options.description: Mutual credit, commons governance, REA accounting

options.label: Digital identity
options.description: Self-sovereign identity, key management, trust networks

options.label: Facilitation skills
options.description: Consent-based decision making, active listening, conflict resolution
